scripts.dev: concurrently -n motor,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/motor-grpc" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:no-kill: concurrently -n motor,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/motor-grpc" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "npm run dev -w web"
